retry_reason: The put operation never fails; the condition checks only whether the pointer is NULL, which is not a failure scenario.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases the reference on the symlink attached to an afs_vnode. It uses rcu_replace_pointer to atomically clear the vnode's symlink field (with RCU semantics) and then calls afs_put_symlink to decrement the refcount and free the symlink if the reference count reaches zero. After this call, the symlink pointer must not be used. The operation is safe to call even if the symlink is already NULL (no-op).

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release a reference on the symlink object (afs_symlink) by calling afs_put_symlink after clearing the pointer. There is no additional business logic.
